name: parapara1_loop
note: Para Para dance, 24-frame seamless loop at 12FPS (2s per cycle). Para Para essence: ALL the motion is in the ARMS, which trace one large smooth continuous arc with OPEN FLAT HANDS, fingers together and elegantly extended (never fists); the LOWER BODY is nearly stationary — feet planted about shoulder-width apart, flat on the floor except small described heel lifts, only a gentle rhythmic knee bounce, NO jumping, NO squatting, NO stepping. Arc of the cycle: 0 hands together at chest center → 1-3 sweep out to image-left at shoulder height → 4-6 rise diagonally to upper-left → 7-8 sweep across directly overhead → 9-11 descend on the image-right side to shoulder height → 12-14 sweep back across the chest and CROSS wrists in an X → 15-17 fling open wide to both sides → 18-21 hands fold in beside her cheeks for cute wrist flicks → 22-23 hands return together at chest center for a seamless loop. Frame wording uses IMAGE-side directions (viewer's left/right).
frames: Pose: dancing Para Para, loop start: standing with her feet planted about shoulder-width apart, flat on the floor, knees slightly soft at the bottom of a gentle bounce. Both arms bent with both open flat hands held together in front of the center of her chest, palms facing down, fingertips almost touching, fingers together and extended elegantly. Confident happy idol smile, eyes bright. No jump, no squat — all motion is in her arms and a gentle knee bounce. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both open flat hands sweep together away from her chest toward the LEFT side of the image at collarbone height, arms beginning to extend that way, palms down, fingers elegantly extended. Body bouncing up slightly, knees easing, weight shifting gently onto the foot on the LEFT side of the image. Feet stay planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Clean crisp drawing with NO motion-blur streaks, NO swoosh arcs, NO speed lines. Confident happy smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both arms extended toward the LEFT side of the image at shoulder height, both open flat hands palms down with one hand trailing slightly behind the other like a flowing wave, fingers together and extended. Torso leaning a touch toward the LEFT side of the image, the heel on the RIGHT side of the image lifting slightly. Feet otherwise planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Happy smile, eyes following her hands. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both arms fully swept and stretched out toward the LEFT side of the image at shoulder height, open flat hands, palms down. Her head turns slightly to follow her hands, blonde hair swinging toward the LEFT side of the image, knees dipping in a small bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Joyful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both hands beginning to RISE while still on the LEFT side of the image — both arms sweeping upward, open flat hands now at head height on the left, palms turning outward, fingers elegantly extended. Body stretching taller, knees straightening out of the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Bright happy expression, chin lifting. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: BOTH arms together extended diagonally UP toward the upper-LEFT corner of the image — the two arms are parallel and close to each other, BOTH open flat hands side by side above head height, palms facing outward, fingers together and extended elegantly. IMPORTANT: BOTH arms are raised, NEITHER arm hangs down at her side. Chest lifted, body at full stretch, both heels rising slightly off the floor. Feet stay shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Joyful open smile, face tilted up toward her hands. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, overhead sweep: both arms raised HIGH, both open flat hands passing over the top of her head, moving from the LEFT side of the image toward the point directly above her head, palms forward, the oversized lab coat sleeves slipping down her raised arms slightly. Body tall, heels slightly lifted. Feet shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Face tilted up, delighted smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, top of the arc: both arms stretched straight up, both open flat hands directly ABOVE her head side by side, palms facing forward, fingers elegantly extended. Body at its tallest point of the bounce, heels lifted a little off the floor, skirt lifting slightly. Feet shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Radiant open-mouth smile, eyes shining. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: BOTH raised hands passing together over the top of her head toward the RIGHT side of the image — the two arms stay parallel and close to each other, BOTH hands still HIGH above head height, just starting to lean toward the right, palms turning outward. IMPORTANT: BOTH arms are raised high, NEITHER arm hangs down or drops to her side. Blonde hair starting to swing toward the RIGHT side of the image, heels settling back down. Feet shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Happy face following the hands. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: BOTH arms together extended diagonally UP toward the upper-RIGHT corner of the image — the two arms are parallel and close to each other, BOTH open flat hands side by side above head height, palms outward, fingers together and extended. IMPORTANT: BOTH arms are raised, NEITHER arm hangs down at her side. Body stretching toward the RIGHT side of the image, the heel on the LEFT side of the image lifting slightly. Feet shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Joyful smile, face tilted toward her hands. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both arms descending on the right — both arms extended toward the RIGHT side of the image at shoulder height, open flat hands palms down, one hand trailing the other like a wave. Torso leaning a touch toward the RIGHT side of the image, weight on the foot on the RIGHT side of the image, knees dipping in a small bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Happy smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both arms fully swept and stretched out toward the RIGHT side of the image at shoulder height, open flat hands, palms down. Head turned slightly following her hands, blonde hair swung toward the RIGHT side of the image, small knee bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Joyful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both hands sweeping back across the FRONT of her body at chest height, moving from the RIGHT side of the image toward the center, elbows bending, palms down, open flat hands. Body bouncing up slightly, hair settling back toward center. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Playful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both open flat hands in front of the center of her chest, wrists beginning to CROSS, forearms angling inward toward each other, elbows out. Knees soft, gentle bounce down. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Cheeky playful smile, eyes bright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, crossed pose: wrists fully CROSSED in front of her chest forming an X, both hands open and flat with fingers extended, palms toward her body, elbows out wide. Knees dipped at the bottom of the small bounce, head tilted a tiny bit. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Cheeky closed-eye smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, the fling-open begins: the crossed wrists uncross and both open flat hands sweep outward past her shoulders, arms opening to both sides at shoulder height, palms turning up. Body rising out of the dip, chest opening. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Growing bright smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, big open pose: both arms flung open WIDE horizontally to both sides at shoulder height, open flat hands with palms up, fingers elegantly extended, chest open, chin up. Body at the top of the bounce, a few tiny star sparkles around her. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Radiant open-mouth smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: arms still held wide to both sides but settling a touch below shoulder height, palms softening, hair settling, knees dipping gently in the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Warm happy smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both forearms folding inward — elbows tucking in toward her sides, both open hands rising toward her face, palms turning to face her cheeks, fingers up. Small bounce up. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Playful anticipating smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, cute flick pose: both open hands held just beside her cheeks, palms facing OUTWARD toward the viewer, fingers pointing up and elegantly spread, elbows bent and tucked close to her body. Head tilting slightly toward the LEFT side of the image, knees dipping gently. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Adorable big smile, sparkling eyes. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, wrist flick: both hands still beside her cheeks but the wrists flick outward so the palms angle away from her face, fingers fanned. Head tilting slightly toward the RIGHT side of the image, body bouncing up a touch. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Playful grin. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, second flick: both hands beside her cheeks with palms turning back toward the viewer, fingers up, head returning to center. Gentle knee bounce down. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Cheerful grin, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: both hands lowering from her cheeks toward the center of her chest, elbows coming in, palms rotating to face down, fingers together and extended. Knees softening into the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Content happy smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, returning to the loop-start pose: both open flat hands meeting in front of the center of her chest, palms facing down, fingertips almost touching, elbows bent, knees slightly soft at the bottom of the gentle bounce — matching the first frame for a seamless loop. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, flat on the floor, no jump, no squat. Confident happy idol smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
